caption: A man with glasses and grey hair stands behind a brown wooden podium, speaking into a microphone. He is wearing a blue patterned shirt adorned with a colorful turquoise and red beaded necklace. Behind him is a wall of light brown horizontal blinds. On the front of the podium is a logo with a red graphic and the text "LINCOLN". To the right of the podium, a white rectangular overlay displays the text "ORCA". In the foreground, the backs of the heads of several audience members are visible, including people with brown and blonde hair. The man remains in a stationary position, gesturing slightly with his hands on the podium and moving his mouth as he speaks. The scene remains consistent across the frames, with only subtle changes in the man's facial expressions and head position.
